post_setup_checklist: Test mode keys in staging Vercel env
Live mode keys in production Vercel env (only)
Webhook endpoints created and signing secrets pasted into env
Test charge with 4242 4242 4242 4242 → verify booking flow
Confirm metadata appears in Stripe dashboard for filtering
